summary: Excellent audience recording that captures a uniquely weird second set in full glory.
review: The reviewer praises Doug’s capture, calling it the best‑sounding audience tape of the lot and noting the “weird” but enjoyable second set. Both the performance and the recording are described as fabulous, with no technical complaints noted.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 5‑star review lauds both the show’s unusual second set and the high‑quality audience recording, leading to a strong positive rating despite limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Fabulous capture; clear, full‑bodied sound with no reported issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The second set is described as weird and quirky, which the reviewer finds appealing and a highlight of the performance.
